cards.detectability: malformed -> schema; nonmultiple -> invariant; drift_value / offbase_tokens -> ESCAPE all deterministic contracts (only the oracle catches them)
detectors: semantic invariant: value is a round ten
cards.name: Schema drift / semantic corruption
cards.severity: scales magnitude but NOT detectability of escaping kinds
cards.what: The tool returns wrong data. Some outputs are malformed (schema catches them); others are SCHEMA-VALID but wrong — a different round-ten value, or a shifted-but-consecutive token run — which a contract validator accepts.

cards.detectability: recall 1.0 — the signal is explicit, not inferred
cards.name: Provider error
cards.signal: circuit-breaker signal (open after threshold errors in window)
cards.what: The provider returns an explicit error envelope instead of a value (a 5xx-style hard failure). The call raises; there is no content to inspect.
